description: MCP server wrapping Rock RMS API for Grace Church children's ministry attendance, people search, rosters, and trends

userStories.title: Project scaffold and Rock RMS authentication
userStories.description: Create Python MCP server scaffold with pyproject.toml, RockClient class with cookie-based auth, auto-reauth on 403, and Claude Desktop integration via stdio
acceptanceCriteria: Python project with pyproject.toml using mcp SDK and requests
RockClient class authenticates via POST /api/Auth/Login
Handles 204 response with .ROCK cookie from Set-Cookie header
Re-authenticates automatically on 403 and retries the request once
Credentials read from ROCK_USERNAME and ROCK_PASSWORD env vars
MCP server starts via python -m rock_rms_mcp and communicates over stdio
pip install . works

userStories.title: Get attendance counts tool
userStories.description: Tool to query children's check-in attendance by date, service, and location category. Fetches AttendanceOccurrences and Attendances from Rock RMS, buckets by Pelham children's locations.
acceptanceCriteria: Tool get_attendance accepts date (YYYY-MM-DD), optional schedule (saturday/9am/11am), optional location_group
Queries AttendanceOccurrences filtered by date + schedule ID + Pelham kids locations
Queries Attendances where DidAttend eq true, joins to occurrences by OccurrenceId
Returns counts bucketed by category: Play House, Tree House 1F, Tree House 2F, Quest, CG 1/2, CG 3/4 Girls, CG 3/4 Boys, Up & Out, Mosaic
Saturday applies room overrides: Ladybugs→PH, Hedgehogs→TH, Squirrels→CG
Camp Grace locations split by group name: 1st/2nd Grade → CG 1/2, 3rd/4th Grade Girls → CG 3/4 Girls, 3rd/4th Grade Boys → CG 3/4 Boys, Up and Out → Up & Out
If no schedule specified returns all services for that date
If no date specified defaults to most recent Sunday
Returns totals per service and grand total

userStories.title: Search people tool
userStories.description: Tool to search for children, families, or volunteers by name using Rock RMS People/Search endpoint
acceptanceCriteria: Tool search_people accepts name (string), optional group_type filter
Queries GET /api/People/Search?name={name}&includeDetails=true
Returns full name, age/birthdate, email, phone, family members
Limits results to top 10 matches
Can filter to children's group types (Camp Grace, Tree House, Play House, Mosaic)

userStories.title: Get check-in roster tool
userStories.description: Tool to see exactly who checked in for a specific service date and room, resolving PersonAliasIds to names
acceptanceCriteria: Tool get_checkin_roster accepts date, schedule, optional location or group filter
Returns list of checked-in individuals with name, group name, location/room name
Resolves PersonAliasId to Person name via /api/PersonAlias/{id} and /api/People/{id}
Caches person lookups within a single request to minimize API calls
Results sorted by location then by name

userStories.title: Get group roster tool
userStories.description: Tool to view the full member roster for a specific group (e.g. Kerplunk, 3rd Grade Boys) independent of check-in
acceptanceCriteria: Tool get_group_roster accepts group_name (string) or group_id (int)
Searches groups via GET /api/Groups?$filter=contains(Name,'{name}') or by ID
Fetches group members via GET /api/Groups/{id}/Members
Returns member name, role (Leader/Member), status (Active/Inactive)
Includes group metadata: name, description, group type, schedule, location

userStories.title: Attendance trends tool
userStories.description: Tool to compare attendance across multiple weeks for spotting trends and planning staffing
acceptanceCriteria: Tool get_attendance_trends accepts start_date, end_date, optional schedule, optional location_group
Fetches attendance for each Sunday and preceding Saturday in the date range
Returns per-week breakdown by service and category
Includes summary stats: average, min, max, trend direction
Handles missing weeks (holidays, cancellations) showing 0 or no service

userStories.title: List schedules and locations reference tool
userStories.description: Static reference tools that return available Pelham children's schedules and location hierarchy so the LLM knows valid query options
acceptanceCriteria: Tool list_schedules returns all Pelham children's schedule IDs with names and times
Tool list_locations returns the Pelham children's building location hierarchy with IDs and room names
Both return hardcoded Pelham data with no API call needed
Output formatted for easy LLM consumption
